frontier: F3 substitution-neighborhood bridges v2 — seed-poverty + corpus-power surface
claim_layer: L2 relative/structural, KNOWN-script power calibration; no LA value claim; no licence change (Art. XV)

design_executed.cell_bar: SURVIVES_HOLM if median perm-p <= 0.05/12 (E002 Holm-12 per-test bar); NOMINAL <= 0.05; else FLOOR; NO_POWER if >R/2 replicates have <10 gradeable held-out signs

b30.note: hit rate reaches LOO level but held-out shrinks to 17 -> no significance

min_seed_budget_KNOWN_full: LOO (=46) — NO finite budget in {3..30} Holm-survives; monotone-closure scan

corpus_axis_KNOWN_at_LOO.reading: even at 46 anchors the cross-script bridge needs >= ~75% of the cog-list corpus

harness_power_control_CTRL.reading: the harness CAN detect a strong (identity) signal at 4-5 seeds -> the KNOWN failure is channel signal-strength, not detector power

adversarial_wrong_seed_KNOWN.note: clean KNOWN cells already FLOOR at b=5/7 -> preregistered tier-drop contrast uninformative there; see declared post-hoc on CTRL

ctrl_poisoning_b5.reading: ONE wrong seed among 5 poisons a genuine Holm-surviving signal below the bar (G-surface anchor fragility REPRODUCES on this channel); b=7 tolerates 1-2 wrong (stays SURVIVES_HOLM, acc -36%/-51%)

required_hit_rate_b5_KNOWN.reading: the required 5-seed hit rate (0.119) is BELOW the channel's measured LOO rate (0.149): the failure is M1's discriminative geometry at 5 anchor-profile dimensions (delivers only 0.039), NOT an information impossibility — a seed-efficient estimator is not excluded by this surface

la_operating_point.mapping: min-side median alignable support: LA=47 vs KNOWN realized {f0.75: 41.3, f1.0: 56.0} -> f_LA=0.75 (frozen rule); secondary token-ratio mapping would clamp to 1.0 — b=5 is FLOOR at BOTH, mapping choice does not matter
la_operating_point.gap: LA has 5 firm seeds; the bridge as-built needs 46 (9x), or a 3x hit-rate improvement at 5 seeds (0.039 -> 0.119)

verdict_mechanics: CELL_LA (KNOWN, b=5, f=0.75) = FLOOR -> rule 3 of prereg; min_seed_budget = LOO(46); wrong-seed cells corroborate (all FLOOR)

effective_n.info_note: per-cell decision inherits the E002 Holm-12 per-test bar (0.00417); the verdict rests on 2 preregistered cells (CELL_LA, WRONG1) + a monotone-closure scan over 9 budgets — not on any post-hoc cell selection

committed_prediction_outcome: CONFIRMED: min_seed_budget > 5 (predicted 0.70) and verdict in {NOT_VIABLE, MARGINAL} (predicted 0.75); corpus axis confirmed the weaker constraint at LA's operating point (f_LA=0.75, where LOO still survives)
compliance: Art XXII: prereg frozen+hashed before any run; positive control gated first; negative control (full-scramble) gated; verdict mechanical per frozen rules from preregistered cells; post-hoc analyses declared and verdict-neutral; append-only.
